name: wanderplan-ai-integration-tests
description: Cross-service integration tests for WanderPlan AI using Supertest + Jest + Docker Compose

scripts.stack:reset: npm run stack:down && npm run stack:up
scripts.db:seed: docker exec wp-test-postgres psql -U wanderplan -d wanderplan_test -f /dev/stdin < setup/seed.sql
scripts.db:psql: docker exec -it wp-test-postgres psql -U wanderplan -d wanderplan_test
scripts.ci: npm run stack:up && npm run test:integration; EXIT=$?; npm run stack:down; exit $EXIT
